referral_reason: Danger signs and possible severe febrile illness
triage_explanation: The child has danger signs including lethargy with high fever and difficulty breathing. Refer immediately to the nearest health facility.
The child has fever with diarrhea and vomiting, which can lead to dehydration. Arrange same-day review by a health worker.
The child has mild fever and cough without immediate danger signs. Review soon and return earlier if breathing worsens or fever persists.
The child has no immediate danger signs. Monitor at home and seek care if symptoms worsen.

referral_reason: Monitor fever trend and review if persistent
triage_explanation: The child has fever without danger signs. Monitor closely and seek facility care if fever persists or new symptoms appear.
The child has fever with difficulty breathing. Arrange same-day review and refer quickly if breathing becomes worse.
